CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.cancel_clients_overdue_60_days()
 RETURNS TABLE(client_id bigint, client_name text, asaas_subscription_id text, days_overdue integer)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_cutoff_date DATE := CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days';
BEGIN
    -- Retorna os clientes que serão cancelados e seus dados para a Edge Function
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH overdue_clients AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            c.id,
            c.nome || ' ' || COALESCE(c.sobrenome, '') AS full_name,
            ap.asaas_subscription_id,
            ap.asaas_customer_id,
            (CURRENT_DATE - MIN(ap.due_date)::date) AS days_overdue
        FROM clients c
        JOIN asaas_payments ap ON c.id = ap.client_id
        WHERE ap.status = 'OVERDUE'
          AND ap.due_date < v_cutoff_date
          AND c.status != 'CANCELADO'
          AND c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND ap.asaas_subscription_id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY c.id, c.nome, c.sobrenome, ap.asaas_subscription_id, ap.asaas_customer_id
        HAVING (CURRENT_DATE - MIN(ap.due_date)::date) >= 60
    )
    UPDATE clients c
    SET 
        status = 'CANCELADO',
        observacao = COALESCE(observacao || '; ', '') || 
                     'cancelado por atraso superior a 60 dias em ' || CURRENT_DATE,
        updated_at = NOW()
    FROM overdue_clients oc
    WHERE c.id = oc.id
    RETURNING 
        oc.id AS client_id,
        oc.full_name AS client_name,
        oc.asaas_subscription_id,
        oc.days_overdue;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.check_dashboard_functions()
 RETURNS TABLE(function_name text, function_exists boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        f.function_name,
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM pg_proc p
            JOIN pg_namespace n ON p.pronamespace = n.oid
            WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
              AND p.proname = f.function_name
        ) as function_exists
    FROM (VALUES
        ('get_dashboard_overview_cartao'),
        ('get_clinic_overview_new'),
        ('get_card_metrics'),
        ('get_active_clients_history'),
        ('get_overdue_pct_cumulative'),
        ('get_cohort_overdue_by_safra'),
        ('get_plan_segmentation'),
        ('get_sales_dashboard'),
        ('get_card_usage_cohort')
    ) AS f(function_name);
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_new_user(p_email text, p_password text, p_full_name text, p_role text)
 RETURNS uuid
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'extensions'
AS $function$
declare
  new_user_id uuid;
  encrypted_pw text;
begin
  -- Verifica se o email já existe para evitar erro genérico de banco
  if exists (select 1 from auth.users where email = p_email) then
    raise exception 'Este email já está cadastrado no sistema.';
  end if;

  -- Gera o hash da senha (compatível com Supabase Auth)
  -- Agora o gen_salt será encontrado no schema 'extensions'
  encrypted_pw := crypt(p_password, gen_salt('bf'));

  -- Insere na tabela auth.users (Tabela interna do Supabase)
  insert into auth.users (
    instance_id,
    id,
    aud,
    role,
    email,
    encrypted_password,
    email_confirmed_at,
    recovery_sent_at,
    last_sign_in_at,
    raw_app_meta_data,
    raw_user_meta_data,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    confirmation_token,
    email_change,
    email_change_token_new,
    recovery_token
  ) values (
    '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000',
    gen_random_uuid(),
    'authenticated',
    'authenticated',
    p_email,
    encrypted_pw,
    now(), -- Confirma o email automaticamente
    null,
    null,
    '{"provider":"email","providers":["email"]}',
    json_build_object('full_name', p_full_name),
    now(),
    now(),
    '',
    '',
    '',
    ''
  ) returning id into new_user_id;

  -- Insere na tabela public.profiles
  insert into public.profiles (id, email, full_name, role)
  values (new_user_id, p_email, p_full_name, p_role)
  on conflict (id) do update
  set full_name = excluded.full_name,
      role = excluded.role,
      email = excluded.email;

  return new_user_id;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.daily_client_status_sync()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Sincronizar todos os clientes uma vez por dia
    PERFORM public.sync_client_statuses();
    
    -- Registrar execução
    INSERT INTO action_logs (action, details, user_email, created_at)
    VALUES (
        'DAILY_SYNC_EXECUTED',
        jsonb_build_object('timestamp', NOW()),
        'system',
        NOW()
    );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.diagnose_name_matching()
 RETURNS TABLE(client_name_original text, appointment_name_original text, normalized_client_name text, normalized_appointment_name text, is_match boolean)
 LANGUAGE sql
AS $function$
-- O FULL OUTER JOIN é usado para garantir que veremos todos os nomes de ambas as
-- tabelas, mesmo que eles não tenham uma correspondência na outra tabela.
SELECT
c.nome || ' ' || c.sobrenome AS client_name_original,
a.patient_name AS appointment_name_original,
normalize_name(c.nome || ' ' || c.sobrenome) AS normalized_client_name,
normalize_name(a.patient_name) AS normalized_appointment_name,
-- A coluna 'is_match' nos dirá se a nossa lógica de normalização está funcionando
-- para cada par de nomes.
normalize_name(c.nome || ' ' || c.sobrenome) = normalize_name(a.patient_name) AS is_match
FROM
public.clients c
FULL OUTER JOIN
public.appointments a ON normalize_name(c.nome || ' ' || c.sobrenome) = normalize_name(a.patient_name)
LIMIT 100; -- Limitamos a 100 resultados para facilitar a análise inicial.
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_acquisition_vs_overdue(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(new_clients_current_month bigint, overdue_clients_current_month bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint
         FROM clients
         WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
           AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        ) AS new_clients_current_month,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT client_id)::bigint
         FROM asaas_payments p
         JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
         WHERE p.status IN ('OVERDUE', 'PENDING')
           AND p.due_date < CURRENT_DATE
           AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        ) AS overdue_clients_current_month;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_active_clients_history()
 RETURNS TABLE(week_start text, week_label text, active_clients bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH weeks AS (
        SELECT generate_series(
            date_trunc('week', current_date - interval '16 weeks'),
            date_trunc('week', current_date),
            '1 week'::interval
        )::date AS week_start
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(w.week_start, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        to_char(w.week_start, 'DD/MM'),
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.id)::bigint
    FROM weeks w
    LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.created_at::date <= (w.week_start + 6)
                       AND c.status IN ('ATIVO')
                       AND c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
    GROUP BY w.week_start
    ORDER BY w.week_start;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_card_acquisition_forecast()
 RETURNS TABLE(week_start date, count bigint, is_forecast boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
DECLARE
    avg_last_4_weeks numeric;
BEGIN
    SELECT COALESCE(AVG(weekly_count), 0) INTO avg_last_4_weeks
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(id) AS weekly_count
        FROM clients
        WHERE plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - interval '4 weeks')::date
          AND created_at < date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date
        GROUP BY date_trunc('week', created_at)
    ) last_weeks;

    RETURN QUERY
    WITH historical AS (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('week', created_at)::date AS week_start,
            COUNT(id) AS count,
            FALSE AS is_forecast
        FROM clients
        WHERE plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - interval '8 weeks')::date
          AND created_at < date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date
        GROUP BY week_start
    ),
    forecast AS (
        SELECT
            (date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) + (n.week_num || ' weeks')::interval)::date AS week_start,
            ROUND(avg_last_4_weeks)::bigint AS count,
            TRUE AS is_forecast
        FROM generate_series(0, 3) AS n(week_num)
    )
    SELECT * FROM historical
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM forecast
    ORDER BY week_start;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_card_financial_metrics(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result json;
    current_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);
    last_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month');
    last_month_end date := current_month_start - INTERVAL '1 day';
BEGIN
    WITH current_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS receita_bruta,
            COALESCE(SUM(net_value), 0) AS receita_liquida,
            COUNT(DISTINCT client_id) AS clientes_pagantes
        FROM asaas_payments
        WHERE status = 'RECEIVED'
          AND payment_date >= current_month_start
          AND client_id IS NOT NULL
    ),
    previous_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS receita_bruta,
            COALESCE(SUM(net_value), 0) AS receita_liquida,
            COUNT(DISTINCT client_id) AS clientes_pagantes
        FROM asaas_payments
        WHERE status = 'RECEIVED'
          AND payment_date >= last_month_start AND payment_date <= last_month_end
          AND client_id IS NOT NULL
    ),
    a_receber AS (
        SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total
        FROM asaas_payments p
        JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
        WHERE p.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    )
    SELECT json_build_object(
        'receita_bruta', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT receita_bruta FROM current_month),
            'previous', (SELECT receita_bruta FROM previous_month)
        ),
        'receita_liquida', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT receita_liquida FROM current_month),
            'previous', (SELECT receita_liquida FROM previous_month)
        ),
        'clientes_pagantes', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT clientes_pagantes FROM current_month),
            'previous', (SELECT clientes_pagantes FROM previous_month)
        ),
        'a_receber_mes', (SELECT total FROM a_receber)
    ) INTO result;
    RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_card_financial_metrics()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
    WITH 
    month_periods AS (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AS current_month_start,
            date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) + interval '1 month' AS current_month_end,
            date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 month') AS last_month_start,
            date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AS last_month_end
    ),
    current_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(ap.amount), 0) AS total_recebido,
            COALESCE(SUM(ap.net_value), 0) AS total_liquido,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ap.client_id) AS pagantes
        FROM asaas_payments ap
        CROSS JOIN month_periods mp
        WHERE ap.status = 'RECEIVED'
          AND ap.payment_date >= mp.current_month_start
          AND ap.payment_date < mp.current_month_end
    ),
    last_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(ap.amount), 0) AS total_recebido,
            COALESCE(SUM(ap.net_value), 0) AS total_liquido,
            COUNT(DISTINCT ap.client_id) AS pagantes
        FROM asaas_payments ap
        CROSS JOIN month_periods mp
        WHERE ap.status = 'RECEIVED'
          AND ap.payment_date >= mp.last_month_start
          AND ap.payment_date < mp.last_month_end
    ),
    a_receber AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(ap.amount), 0) AS total_aberto
        FROM asaas_payments ap
        WHERE ap.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')
          AND ap.due_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    )
    SELECT json_build_object(
        'receita_bruta',
            json_build_object('current', (SELECT total_recebido FROM current_month),
                             'previous', (SELECT total_recebido FROM last_month)),
        'receita_liquida',
            json_build_object('current', (SELECT total_liquido FROM current_month),
                             'previous', (SELECT total_liquido FROM last_month)),
        'clientes_pagantes',
            json_build_object('current', (SELECT pagantes FROM current_month),
                             'previous', (SELECT pagantes FROM last_month)),
        'a_receber_mes', (SELECT total_aberto FROM a_receber)
    );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_card_overview()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
    WITH 
    target_plans AS (SELECT unnest(ARRAY['Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual']) AS plano),
    clients_base AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM clients
        WHERE plano IN (SELECT plano FROM target_plans)
    ),
    atuais AS (
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ATIVO') AS ativos,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ATRASO') AS atraso,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CANCELADO') AS cancelados,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'INATIVO') AS inativos
        FROM clients_base
    ),
    novos_semana AS (
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)) AS current,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '7 days'
                             AND created_at < date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)) AS previous
        FROM clients_base
    ),
    novos_mes AS (
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS current,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '1 month'
                             AND created_at < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS previous
        FROM clients_base
    ),
    churn_mes AS (
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS cancelados_mes,
            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients_base WHERE status = 'ATIVO') AS total_ativos
        FROM clients_base
        WHERE status = 'CANCELADO'
          AND created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)   -- ⚠️ alterado de updated_at para created_at
    )
    SELECT json_build_object(
        'ativos', (SELECT ativos FROM atuais),
        'atraso', (SELECT atraso FROM atuais),
        'cancelados', (SELECT cancelados FROM atuais),
        'inativos', (SELECT inativos FROM atuais),
        'novos_semana', json_build_object('current', (SELECT current FROM novos_semana),
                                          'previous', (SELECT previous FROM novos_semana)),
        'novos_mes', json_build_object('current', (SELECT current FROM novos_mes),
                                      'previous', (SELECT previous FROM novos_mes)),
        'churn_mes', json_build_object(
            'cancelados', (SELECT cancelados_mes FROM churn_mes),
            'taxa', CASE WHEN (SELECT total_ativos FROM churn_mes) > 0 
                        THEN ROUND((SELECT cancelados_mes FROM churn_mes) * 100.0 / (SELECT total_ativos FROM churn_mes), 2)
                        ELSE 0 END
        )
    );
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_card_usage_cohort(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(cohort_month text, month_number integer, total_in_cohort bigint, used_clinic bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_plans text[];
BEGIN
    IF plan_filter = 'all' OR plan_filter IS NULL THEN
        v_plans := ARRAY(SELECT DISTINCT plano FROM clients WHERE plano IS NOT NULL);
    ELSE
        v_plans := string_to_array(plan_filter, ',');
    END IF;
    v_plans := ARRAY(SELECT trim(x) FROM unnest(v_plans) x);

    RETURN QUERY
    WITH titulares AS (
        -- Um titular por linha, com sua safra
        SELECT
            c.id AS titular_id,
            date_trunc('month', c.created_at)::date AS cohort_start
        FROM clients c
        WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dependents d WHERE d.titular_id = c.id)
          AND c.plano = ANY(v_plans)
          AND c.created_at >= '2023-01-01'
    ),
    months AS (
        SELECT generate_series(0, 11) AS mn
    ),
    -- Para cada combinação titular × mês, verificar se usou a clínica
    uso AS (
        SELECT
            t.titular_id,
            t.cohort_start,
            m.mn,
            -- mês alvo = cohort_start + mn meses
            (t.cohort_start + (m.mn || ' months')::interval)::date AS mes_alvo_inicio,
            (t.cohort_start + ((m.mn + 1) || ' months')::interval)::date AS mes_alvo_fim
        FROM titulares t
        CROSS JOIN months m
        WHERE t.cohort_start + (m.mn || ' months')::interval <= current_date
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(u.cohort_start, 'YYYY/MM'),
        u.mn::int,
        COUNT(DISTINCT u.titular_id)::bigint,
        -- Titular usou OU algum dependente seu usou no mês alvo
        COUNT(DISTINCT u.titular_id) FILTER (
            WHERE
                EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1 FROM appointments a
                    WHERE a.client_id = u.titular_id
                      AND a.appointment_date >= u.mes_alvo_inicio
                      AND a.appointment_date < u.mes_alvo_fim
                      AND a.status != 'cancelado'
                )
                OR EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1 FROM appointments a
                    JOIN dependents d ON d.id = a.client_id
                    WHERE d.titular_id = u.titular_id
                      AND a.appointment_date >= u.mes_alvo_inicio
                      AND a.appointment_date < u.mes_alvo_fim
                      AND a.status != 'cancelado'
                )
        )::bigint
    FROM uso u
    GROUP BY u.cohort_start, u.mn
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT u.titular_id) > 0
    ORDER BY u.cohort_start, u.mn;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_card_usage_cohort()
 RETURNS TABLE(cohort_month text, month_number integer, total_in_cohort bigint, used_clinic bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH titulares AS (
        SELECT
            c.id AS titular_id,
            date_trunc('month', c.created_at)::date AS cohort_start
        FROM clients c
        WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND c.created_at >= '2023-01-01'
    ),
    months AS (
        SELECT generate_series(0, 11) AS mn
    ),
    uso AS (
        SELECT
            t.titular_id,
            t.cohort_start,
            m.mn,
            (t.cohort_start + (m.mn || ' months')::interval)::date AS mes_alvo_inicio,
            (t.cohort_start + ((m.mn + 1) || ' months')::interval)::date AS mes_alvo_fim
        FROM titulares t
        CROSS JOIN months m
        WHERE t.cohort_start + (m.mn || ' months')::interval <= current_date
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(u.cohort_start, 'YYYY/MM'),
        u.mn::int,
        COUNT(DISTINCT u.titular_id)::bigint AS total_in_cohort,
        COUNT(DISTINCT u.titular_id) FILTER (
            WHERE EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM appointments a
                WHERE (a.client_id = u.titular_id OR a.client_id IN (SELECT d.id FROM dependents d WHERE d.titular_id = u.titular_id))
                  AND a.appointment_date >= u.mes_alvo_inicio
                  AND a.appointment_date < u.mes_alvo_fim
                  AND a.status != 'cancelado'
            )
        )::bigint AS used_clinic
    FROM uso u
    GROUP BY u.cohort_start, u.mn
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT u.titular_id) > 0
    ORDER BY u.cohort_start, u.mn;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_churn_data(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(mes text, taxa_churn numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH monthly_data AS (
        SELECT 
            to_char(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'YYYY-MM') as mes,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CANCELADO') as cancelados,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ATIVO') as ativos
        FROM clients
        WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL 
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '6 months'
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY date_trunc('month', created_at)
    )
    SELECT 
        md.mes,
        CASE 
            WHEN md.ativos > 0 THEN ROUND((md.cancelados * 100.0 / md.ativos), 2)
            ELSE 0 
        END as taxa_churn
    FROM monthly_data md
    ORDER BY md.mes;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_churn_risk_clients()
 RETURNS TABLE(nome text, telefone text, email text, plano text, ultima_consulta date)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
RETURN QUERY
WITH last_appointment AS (
SELECT
a.client_id,
MAX(a.appointment_date) AS last_date
FROM public.appointments a
WHERE a.client_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a.client_id
)
SELECT
(c.nome || ' ' || c.sobrenome) as nome,
c.telefone,
c.email,
c.plano,
la.last_date AS ultima_consulta
FROM public.clients c
LEFT JOIN last_appointment la ON c.id = la.client_id
WHERE
c.status = 'ATIVO'
AND (la.last_date IS NULL OR la.last_date < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days'));
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_client_acquisition_forecast(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(week_start date, count bigint, is_forecast boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    avg_last_4_weeks DECIMAL;
BEGIN
    SELECT COALESCE(AVG(weekly_count), 0) INTO avg_last_4_weeks
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(c.id)::decimal as weekly_count
        FROM public.clients c
        WHERE c.created_at >= date_trunc('week', now() - interval '4 weeks')::date
          AND c.created_at < date_trunc('week', now())::date
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY date_trunc('week', c.created_at)
    ) AS last_weeks;

    RETURN QUERY
    WITH historical_data AS (
        SELECT
            (date_trunc('week', c.created_at))::date AS week_start,
            COUNT(c.id) AS count,
            FALSE AS is_forecast
        FROM public.clients c
        WHERE c.created_at >= date_trunc('week', now() - interval '8 weeks')::date
          AND c.created_at < date_trunc('week', now())::date
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY (date_trunc('week', c.created_at))::date
    ),
    forecast_data AS (
        SELECT
            (date_trunc('week', now())::date + (n.week_num || ' weeks')::interval)::date AS week_start,
            ROUND(avg_last_4_weeks)::bigint AS count,
            TRUE AS is_forecast
        FROM generate_series(0, 3) AS n(week_num)
    )
    SELECT * FROM historical_data
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM forecast_data
    ORDER BY week_start;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_client_report_data()
 RETURNS TABLE(client_name text, phone text, plan text, registration_date date, last_consultation_date date, avg_recurrence_days numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
RETURN QUERY
WITH client_appointments AS (
SELECT
c.id as client_id,
(c.nome || ' ' || c.sobrenome) AS client_name,
c.telefone, c.plano, c.created_at::date as registration_date,
a.appointment_date,
a.appointment_date - LAG(a.appointment_date, 1) OVER(PARTITION BY c.id ORDER BY a.appointment_date) as diff_days
FROM public.clients c
JOIN public.appointments a ON c.id = a.client_id
WHERE c.status = 'ATIVO'
)
SELECT
ca.client_name, ca.telefone, ca.plano, ca.registration_date,
MAX(ca.appointment_date) as last_consultation_date,
ROUND(AVG(ca.diff_days), 0) as avg_recurrence_days
FROM client_appointments ca
GROUP BY ca.client_id, ca.client_name, ca.telefone, ca.plano, ca.registration_date
ORDER BY ca.client_name;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_clinic_financial_metrics(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result json;
    current_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);
    last_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month');
    last_month_end date := current_month_start - INTERVAL '1 day';
BEGIN
    WITH current_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS faturamento,
            COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS consultas_pagas,
            CASE
                WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) > 0
                THEN COALESCE(SUM(p.amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT a.id), 0)
                ELSE 0
            END AS ticket_medio
        FROM appointments a
        JOIN payments p ON a.id = p.appointment_id
        JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE a.appointment_date >= current_month_start
          AND a.appointment_date < current_month_start + INTERVAL '1 month'
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    previous_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS faturamento,
            COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS consultas_pagas
        FROM appointments a
        JOIN payments p ON a.id = p.appointment_id
        JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE a.appointment_date >= last_month_start
          AND a.appointment_date < current_month_start
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    )
    SELECT json_build_object(
        'faturamento', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT faturamento FROM current_month),
            'previous', (SELECT faturamento FROM previous_month)
        ),
        'consultas_pagas', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT consultas_pagas FROM current_month),
            'previous', (SELECT consultas_pagas FROM previous_month)
        ),
        'ticket_medio', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT ticket_medio FROM current_month)
        )
    ) INTO result;
    RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_clinic_overview(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result json;
    current_week_start date := date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE);
    last_week_start date := current_week_start - interval '1 week';
    current_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);
    last_month_start date := current_month_start - interval '1 month';
    
    -- NOVA LÓGICA: Capacidade baseada em Salas
    total_salas int := 4; 
    monthly_capacity int;
BEGIN
    -- Capacidade = 4 Salas * 22 dias úteis * 16 consultas/dia (8h/dia * 2 consultas/h)
    monthly_capacity := GREATEST(total_salas * 22 * 16, 1);

    WITH consultas_hoje AS (
        SELECT COUNT(*) as count
        FROM appointments a
        JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE a.appointment_date = CURRENT_DATE
        AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    consultas_semana AS (
        SELECT 
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.appointment_date >= current_week_start) as current,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.appointment_date >= last_week_start AND a.appointment_date < current_week_start) as previous
        FROM appointments a
        JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    consultas_mes AS (
        SELECT 
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.appointment_date >= current_month_start) as current,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.appointment_date >= last_month_start AND a.appointment_date < current_month_start) as previous
        FROM appointments a
        JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    ocupacao AS (
        SELECT 
            -- Cálculo atualizado usando a nova monthly_capacity
            COALESCE((COUNT(*) * 100.0 / monthly_capacity), 0) as current_occupancy
        FROM appointments a
        JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE a.appointment_date >= current_month_start
        AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    )
    SELECT json_build_object(
        'consultas_hoje', (SELECT count FROM consultas_hoje),
        'consultas_semana', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT current FROM consultas_semana),
            'previous', (SELECT previous FROM consultas_semana)
        ),
        'consultas_mes', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT current FROM consultas_mes),
            'previous', (SELECT previous FROM consultas_mes)
        ),
        'ocupacao_salas', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT current_occupancy FROM ocupacao),
            'previous', 0
        )
    ) INTO result;
    
    RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cohort_metrics(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(mes_entrada text, total_safra bigint, mes_1 numeric, mes_2 numeric, mes_3 numeric, mes_6 numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  WITH first_payment AS (
    SELECT 
      ap.client_id,
      date_trunc('month', MIN(ap.payment_date)) as cohort_month
    FROM public.asaas_payments ap
    JOIN public.clients c ON ap.client_id = c.id
    WHERE ap.status = 'RECEIVED'
      AND ap.payment_date IS NOT NULL
      AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    GROUP BY ap.client_id
  ),
  monthly_activity AS (
    SELECT 
      fp.client_id,
      fp.cohort_month,
      ap.payment_date,
      EXTRACT(MONTH FROM age(date_trunc('month', ap.payment_date), fp.cohort_month))::int as month_number
    FROM public.asaas_payments ap
    JOIN first_payment fp ON ap.client_id = fp.client_id
    JOIN public.clients c ON ap.client_id = c.id
    WHERE ap.status = 'RECEIVED'
      AND ap.payment_date IS NOT NULL
      AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
  ),
  cohort_size AS (
    SELECT 
      cohort_month,
      COUNT(DISTINCT client_id) as total_clients
    FROM first_payment
    GROUP BY cohort_month
  ),
  retention_data AS (
    SELECT 
      ma.cohort_month,
      cs.total_clients,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.month_number = 1 THEN ma.client_id END) as month_1,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.month_number = 2 THEN ma.client_id END) as month_2,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.month_number = 3 THEN ma.client_id END) as month_3,
      COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ma.month_number = 6 THEN ma.client_id END) as month_6
    FROM monthly_activity ma
    JOIN cohort_size cs ON ma.cohort_month = cs.cohort_month
    GROUP BY ma.cohort_month, cs.total_clients
  )
  SELECT
    to_char(rd.cohort_month, 'YYYY-MM') as mes_entrada,
    rd.total_clients::bigint as total_safra,
    CASE WHEN rd.total_clients > 0 
      THEN ROUND((rd.month_1::numeric / rd.total_clients::numeric) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as mes_1,
    CASE WHEN rd.total_clients > 0 
      THEN ROUND((rd.month_2::numeric / rd.total_clients::numeric) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as mes_2,
    CASE WHEN rd.total_clients > 0 
      THEN ROUND((rd.month_3::numeric / rd.total_clients::numeric) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as mes_3,
    CASE WHEN rd.total_clients > 0 
      THEN ROUND((rd.month_6::numeric / rd.total_clients::numeric) * 100, 2)
      ELSE 0 
    END as mes_6
  FROM retention_data rd
  WHERE rd.cohort_month >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months')
  ORDER BY rd.cohort_month DESC;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cohort_overdue_by_safra()
 RETURNS TABLE(acquisition_month text, month_number integer, total_in_cohort bigint, overdue_count bigint, overdue_pct numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH titulares AS (
        SELECT
            c.id,
            date_trunc('month', c.created_at)::date AS cohort_start,
            (SELECT date_trunc('month', MIN(ap.due_date))::date
             FROM asaas_payments ap
             WHERE ap.client_id = c.id AND ap.status = 'OVERDUE'
            ) AS first_overdue_month
        FROM clients c
        WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND c.created_at >= current_date - interval '18 months'
    ),
    safra_totals AS (
        SELECT cohort_start, COUNT(*)::bigint AS total
        FROM titulares
        GROUP BY cohort_start
    ),
    safra_overdue AS (
        SELECT
            t.cohort_start,
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(t.first_overdue_month, t.cohort_start))::int * 12
            + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM AGE(t.first_overdue_month, t.cohort_start))::int AS mn,
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS cnt
        FROM titulares t
        WHERE t.first_overdue_month IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY t.cohort_start, mn
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(st.cohort_start, 'YYYY/MM'),
        COALESCE(so.mn, 0)::int,
        st.total,
        COALESCE(so.cnt, 0)::bigint,
        ROUND(COALESCE(so.cnt, 0)::numeric / NULLIF(st.total, 0) * 100, 1)
    FROM safra_totals st
    LEFT JOIN safra_overdue so ON so.cohort_start = st.cohort_start
    WHERE so.cohort_start IS NOT NULL -- Mostra apenas safras com inadimplentes
    ORDER BY st.cohort_start, so.mn;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_cohort_overdue_percentage(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(cohort_month text, total_clients bigint, clients_with_overdue bigint, overdue_percentage numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH first_payment AS (
        SELECT
            c.id,
            date_trunc('month', MIN(p.payment_date))::date AS cohort_date
        FROM clients c
        JOIN asaas_payments p ON c.id = p.client_id
        WHERE p.status = 'RECEIVED'
          AND p.payment_date IS NOT NULL
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY c.id
    ),
    current_overdue AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT client_id
        FROM asaas_payments
        WHERE status IN ('OVERDUE', 'PENDING')
          AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(fp.cohort_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS cohort_month,
        COUNT(DISTINCT fp.id)::bigint AS total_clients,
        COUNT(DISTINCT co.client_id)::bigint AS clients_with_overdue,
        ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT co.client_id) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fp.id), 0))::numeric, 2) AS overdue_percentage
    FROM first_payment fp
    LEFT JOIN current_overdue co ON fp.id = co.client_id
    GROUP BY fp.cohort_date
    ORDER BY fp.cohort_date DESC;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_consultation_forecast(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(week_start date, count bigint, is_forecast boolean)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
DECLARE
    avg_last_4_weeks numeric;
BEGIN
    SELECT COALESCE(AVG(weekly_count), 0) INTO avg_last_4_weeks
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(a.id) AS weekly_count
        FROM appointments a
        LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE a.appointment_date >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - interval '4 weeks')::date
          AND a.appointment_date < date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date
          AND a.status != 'cancelado'
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY date_trunc('week', a.appointment_date)
    ) last_weeks;

    RETURN QUERY
    WITH historical AS (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('week', a.appointment_date)::date AS week_start,
            COUNT(a.id) AS count,
            FALSE AS is_forecast
        FROM appointments a
        LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE a.appointment_date >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - interval '8 weeks')::date
          AND a.appointment_date < date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date
          AND a.status != 'cancelado'
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY week_start
    ),
    forecast AS (
        SELECT
            (date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE) + (n.week_num || ' weeks')::interval)::date AS week_start,
            ROUND(avg_last_4_weeks)::bigint AS count,
            TRUE AS is_forecast
        FROM generate_series(0, 3) AS n(week_num)
    )
    SELECT * FROM historical
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM forecast
    ORDER BY week_start;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_consultations_by_plan(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(plano text, count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
        c.plano,
        COUNT(a.id) as count
    FROM appointments a
    JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
    WHERE a.appointment_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    GROUP BY c.plano
    ORDER BY count DESC;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_consultations_by_professional(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(professional_name text, count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        p.name AS professional_name,
        COUNT(a.id) AS count
    FROM public.appointments a
    JOIN public.professionals AS p ON a.professional_id = p.id
    JOIN public.clients AS c ON a.client_id = c.id
    WHERE a.appointment_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
    AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    GROUP BY p.name
    ORDER BY count DESC;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_daily_metrics(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
result JSON;
BEGIN
WITH today_appointments AS (
SELECT a.*
FROM public.appointments a
JOIN public.clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
WHERE a.appointment_date = CURRENT_DATE
AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
),
revenue AS (
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) as total
FROM public.payments p
JOIN today_appointments ta ON p.appointment_id = ta.id
)
SELECT json_build_object(
'consultas_dia', (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM today_appointments),
'capital_esperado', (SELECT total FROM revenue),
'clientes_ativos', (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM public.clients WHERE status = 'ATIVO' AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ','))))
)
INTO result;
RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_metrics(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
result json;
start_current_month date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);
end_current_month date := start_current_month + interval '1 month';
start_last_month date := start_current_month - interval '1 month';
end_last_month date := start_current_month;
BEGIN
WITH
clients_filtered AS (
SELECT id, plano, created_at, status
FROM public.clients
WHERE (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
),
current_month_metrics AS (
SELECT
COUNT(DISTINCT cf.id) FILTER (WHERE cf.created_at >= start_current_month AND cf.created_at < end_current_month) AS novos_clientes,
COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS consultas_mes,
COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS faturamento_total,
COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE a.status = 'cancelado') AS noshow_count
FROM clients_filtered AS cf
LEFT JOIN public.appointments a ON cf.id = a.client_id AND a.appointment_date >= start_current_month AND a.appointment_date < end_current_month
LEFT JOIN public.payments p ON a.id = p.appointment_id
),
last_month_metrics AS (
SELECT
COUNT(DISTINCT cf.id) FILTER (WHERE cf.created_at >= start_last_month AND cf.created_at < end_last_month) AS novos_clientes,
COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS consultas_mes,
COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS faturamento_total,
COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FILTER (WHERE a.status = 'cancelado') AS noshow_count
FROM clients_filtered AS cf
LEFT JOIN public.appointments a ON cf.id = a.client_id AND a.appointment_date >= start_last_month AND a.appointment_date < end_last_month
LEFT JOIN public.payments p ON a.id = p.appointment_id
),
titulares_count AS (
SELECT
COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE created_at < end_current_month AND status = 'ATIVO') as current,
COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE created_at < end_last_month AND status = 'ATIVO') as previous
FROM clients_filtered
)
SELECT json_build_object(
'total_titulares', json_build_object('current', tc.current, 'previous', tc.previous),
'novos_clientes', json_build_object('current', cmm.novos_clientes, 'previous', lmm.novos_clientes),
'consultas_mes', json_build_object('current', cmm.consultas_mes, 'previous', lmm.consultas_mes),
'ticket_medio', json_build_object(
'current', CASE WHEN cmm.consultas_mes > 0 THEN cmm.faturamento_total / cmm.consultas_mes ELSE 0 END,
'previous', CASE WHEN lmm.consultas_mes > 0 THEN lmm.faturamento_total / lmm.consultas_mes ELSE 0 END
),
'noshow_rate', json_build_object(
'current', CASE WHEN (cmm.consultas_mes + cmm.noshow_count) > 0 THEN (cmm.noshow_count * 100.0 / (cmm.consultas_mes + cmm.noshow_count)) ELSE 0 END,
'previous', CASE WHEN (lmm.consultas_mes + lmm.noshow_count) > 0 THEN (lmm.noshow_count * 100.0 / (lmm.consultas_mes + lmm.noshow_count)) ELSE 0 END
)
) INTO result
FROM current_month_metrics cmm, last_month_metrics lmm, titulares_count tc;
RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_overview_cartao()
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_result json;
    v_inicio_mes_atual  date := date_trunc('month', current_date)::date;
    v_inicio_mes_ant    date := date_trunc('month', current_date - interval '1 month')::date;
    v_fim_mes_ant       date := (date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date;
    v_total_ativos       bigint;
    v_total_atraso       bigint;
    v_taxa_inadimplencia numeric;
    v_tempo_medio_atraso numeric;
BEGIN
    -- Total de titulares ativos (somente ATIVOS, não 'ATRASO') para os planos de cartão
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO v_total_ativos
    FROM clients
    WHERE status = 'ATIVO'
      AND plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual');

    -- Total de titulares em atraso para os planos de cartão
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO v_total_atraso
    FROM clients
    WHERE status = 'ATRASO'
      AND plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual');

    -- Taxa de inadimplência: (Atraso) / (Ativos + Atraso)
    -- A base são os clientes que deveriam estar pagando (Ativos + Atraso)
    v_taxa_inadimplencia := COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            (v_total_atraso::numeric / NULLIF((v_total_ativos + v_total_atraso), 0)) * 100,
        2), 0);

    -- Tempo médio de atraso em dias (considerando apenas cobranças em aberto)
    SELECT COALESCE(
        ROUND(AVG(current_date - ap.due_date)::numeric, 0), 0)
    INTO v_tempo_medio_atraso
    FROM asaas_payments ap
    JOIN clients c ON c.id = ap.client_id
    WHERE ap.status = 'OVERDUE'
      AND ap.due_date < current_date
      AND c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual');

    SELECT json_build_object(
        'receita_mes',
            COALESCE((
                SELECT SUM(net_value)
                FROM asaas_payments ap
                -- JOIN clients c ON c.id = ap.client_id
                WHERE ap.status IN ('RECEIVED', 'CONFIRMED','RECEIVED_IN_CASH')
                  AND ap.payment_date >= '2026-02-01'
                --   AND c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
            ), 0),
        'receita_mes_anterior',
            COALESCE((
                SELECT SUM(net_value)
                FROM asaas_payments ap
                -- JOIN clients c ON c.id = ap.client_id
                WHERE ap.status IN ('RECEIVED', 'CONFIRMED','RECEIVED_IN_CASH')
                  AND ap.payment_date >= '2026-01-01'
                  AND ap.payment_date <= '2025-01-31'
                --   AND c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
            ), 0),
        'clientes_ativos', v_total_ativos,
        'taxa_inadimplencia', v_taxa_inadimplencia,
        'tempo_medio_atraso', v_tempo_medio_atraso
    ) INTO v_result;

    RETURN v_result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_dashboard_summary_report(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result json;
BEGIN
    -- Chama as funções já existentes e consolida
    SELECT json_build_object(
        'card_financials', get_card_financial_metrics(plan_filter),
        'card_overview', get_card_overview(plan_filter),
        'clinic_financials', get_clinic_financial_metrics(plan_filter),

        'acquisition_vs_overdue', (SELECT row_to_json(t) FROM get_acquisition_vs_overdue(plan_filter) t),
        'cohort_overdue', (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM get_cohort_overdue_percentage(plan_filter) t),
        'updated_at', now()

    RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_financial_metrics(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    result json;
    current_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);
    next_month_start date := current_month_start + interval '1 month';
    last_month_start date := current_month_start - interval '1 month';
BEGIN
    WITH calculated_appointments AS (
        SELECT
            a.appointment_date,
            -- LÓGICA DO VALOR BRUTO
            CASE
                -- 1. Se tem pagamento registrado, usa o valor real
                WHEN p.amount IS NOT NULL THEN p.amount
                
                -- 2. Se não tem pagamento E a data é anterior a hoje (e não foi cancelado)
                -- Assume que foi realizado e pago o valor padrão de R$ 50,00
                WHEN a.appointment_date < CURRENT_DATE AND a.status != 'cancelado' THEN 50.00
                
                -- 3. Consultas futuras ou canceladas sem pagamento contam como 0 no faturamento realizado
                ELSE 0
            END as valor_bruto
        FROM appointments a
        LEFT JOIN payments p ON a.id = p.appointment_id
        JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    
    -- Agrupa dados do Mês Atual
    current_month_agg AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(valor_bruto), 0) as total_bruto,
            COALESCE(SUM(valor_bruto * 0.25), 0) as total_liquido -- Regra: 25% do bruto
        FROM calculated_appointments
        WHERE appointment_date >= current_month_start AND appointment_date < next_month_start
    ),
    
    -- Agrupa dados do Mês Anterior
    last_month_agg AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(valor_bruto), 0) as total_bruto,
            COALESCE(SUM(valor_bruto * 0.25), 0) as total_liquido -- Regra: 25% do bruto
        FROM calculated_appointments
        WHERE appointment_date >= last_month_start AND appointment_date < current_month_start
    ),
    
    -- Cálculo da Expectativa (Realizado + Projeção Futura)
    expectativa_calc AS (
        SELECT
            -- Soma o que já foi faturado (calculado acima)
            (SELECT total_bruto FROM current_month_agg) +
            -- Soma projeção para o restante do mês (Consultas Futuras sem pagamento * R$ 50,00)
            COALESCE((
                SELECT COUNT(*) * 50.00
                FROM appointments a
                JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
                LEFT JOIN payments p ON a.id = p.appointment_id
                WHERE a.appointment_date >= CURRENT_DATE 
                  AND a.appointment_date < next_month_start
                  AND a.status != 'cancelado'
                  AND p.id IS NULL -- Apenas as sem pagamento
                  AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
            ), 0) as valor_total_expectativa
    )

    -- Monta o JSON de resposta
    SELECT json_build_object(
        'faturamento_bruto', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT total_bruto FROM current_month_agg),
            'previous', (SELECT total_bruto FROM last_month_agg)
        ),
        'faturamento_liquido', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT total_liquido FROM current_month_agg),
            'previous', (SELECT total_liquido FROM last_month_agg)
        ),
        'expectativa_faturamento', json_build_object(
            'current', (SELECT valor_total_expectativa FROM expectativa_calc)
        )
    ) INTO result;
    
    RETURN result;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_inadimplencia_data(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(mes text, taxa_inadimplencia numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH monthly_data AS (
        SELECT 
            to_char(date_trunc('month', created_at), 'YYYY-MM') as mes,
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'ATRASO') as atraso,
            COUNT(*) as total
        FROM clients
        WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL
          AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '6 months'
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY date_trunc('month', created_at)
    )
    SELECT 
        md.mes,
        CASE 
            WHEN md.total > 0 THEN ROUND((md.atraso * 100.0 / md.total), 2)
            ELSE 0 
        END as taxa_inadimplencia
    FROM monthly_data md
    ORDER BY md.mes;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_monthly_cohorts(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(cohort_month text, month_number integer, active_clients bigint, total_in_cohort bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
RETURN QUERY
    WITH cohorts AS (
        SELECT id AS client_id, date_trunc('month', created_at)::date AS cohort_date
        FROM public.clients
        WHERE status = 'ATIVO' 
        AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    activity AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            c.id AS client_id,
            date_trunc('month', a.appointment_date)::date AS activity_date
        FROM public.appointments a
        JOIN public.clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    cohort_activity AS (
        SELECT
            c.client_id, c.cohort_date,
            EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.activity_date)::int * 12 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.activity_date)::int
            - (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c.cohort_date)::int * 12 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM c.cohort_date)::int) AS month_number
        FROM cohorts c JOIN activity a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
        WHERE a.activity_date >= c.cohort_date
    ),
    cohort_size AS (
        SELECT cohort_date, count(*) AS total FROM cohorts GROUP BY cohort_date
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(ca.cohort_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS cohort_month, ca.month_number,
        count(DISTINCT ca.client_id) AS active_clients, cs.total AS total_in_cohort
    FROM cohort_activity ca JOIN cohort_size cs ON ca.cohort_date = cs.cohort_date
    GROUP BY ca.cohort_date, ca.month_number, cs.total
    ORDER BY ca.cohort_date, ca.month_number;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_monthly_consultations(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(mes text, total_consultas bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
    SELECT
        to_char(date_trunc('month', a.appointment_date), 'YYYY-MM') AS mes,
        COUNT(*)::bigint AS total_consultas
    FROM appointments a
    JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
    WHERE (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    GROUP BY date_trunc('month', a.appointment_date)
    ORDER BY date_trunc('month', a.appointment_date);
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_overdue_pct_cumulative()
 RETURNS TABLE(week_start text, week_label text, overdue_pct_cumulative numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH weeks AS (
        SELECT generate_series(
            date_trunc('week', current_date - interval '16 weeks'),
            date_trunc('week', current_date),
            '1 week'::interval
        )::date AS ws
    ),
    active_clients_by_week AS (
        SELECT
            w.ws,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_ativos_na_semana
        FROM weeks w
        LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.created_at::date <= (w.ws + 6)
                           AND c.status IN ('ATIVO', 'ATRASO')
                           AND c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
        GROUP BY w.ws
    ),
    overdue_clients_by_week AS (
        SELECT
            w.ws,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS total_atraso_na_semana
        FROM weeks w
        LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.created_at::date <= (w.ws + 6)
                           AND c.status = 'ATRASO'
                           AND c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
        GROUP BY w.ws
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(acw.ws, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
        to_char(acw.ws, 'DD/MM'),
        COALESCE(ROUND(
            (ocw.total_atraso_na_semana::numeric / NULLIF(acw.total_ativos_na_semana, 0)) * 100,
        2), 0)
    FROM active_clients_by_week acw
    LEFT JOIN overdue_clients_by_week ocw ON acw.ws = ocw.ws
    ORDER BY acw.ws;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_plan_segmentation()
 RETURNS TABLE(plan_name text, total_ativos bigint, novos_semana bigint, novos_semana_anterior bigint, novos_mes bigint, novos_mes_anterior bigint, taxa_inadimplencia numeric, tempo_medio_atraso numeric, uso_clinica_pct numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_semana_inicio     date := date_trunc('week', current_date)::date;
    v_semana_ant_inicio date := (date_trunc('week', current_date) - interval '7 days')::date;
    v_semana_ant_fim    date := date_trunc('week', current_date)::date - 1;
    v_mes_inicio        date := date_trunc('month', current_date)::date;
    v_mes_ant_inicio    date := date_trunc('month', current_date - interval '1 month')::date;
    v_mes_ant_fim       date := (date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date;
    v_mes_fim           date := (date_trunc('month', current_date) + interval '1 month - 1 day')::date;
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH plan_base AS (
        SELECT
            c.plano,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.status IN ('ATIVO')) AS totais,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.created_at::date >= v_semana_inicio) AS n_sem,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.created_at::date >= v_semana_ant_inicio AND c.created_at::date <= v_semana_ant_fim) AS n_sem_ant,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.created_at::date >= v_mes_inicio) AS n_mes,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.created_at::date >= v_mes_ant_inicio AND c.created_at::date <= v_mes_ant_fim) AS n_mes_ant
        FROM clients c
        WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
        GROUP BY c.plano
    ),
    -- OTIMIZAÇÃO 1: Pré-calcular overdue_stats apenas para clientes dos planos específicos
    -- e usar client_id em vez de asaas_customer_id para o JOIN
    overdue_stats AS (
        SELECT
            c.plano,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS qtd_em_divida,
            AVG(current_date - ap.due_date) AS avg_delay
        FROM clients c
        INNER JOIN asaas_payments ap ON ap.client_id = c.id  -- USANDO client_id em vez de asaas_customer_id
        WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND ap.status = 'OVERDUE'
          AND ap.due_date < current_date
        GROUP BY c.plano
    ),
    -- OTIMIZAÇÃO 2: Simplificar a subquery de uso clínico com um CTE auxiliar
    clientes_com_uso AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            CASE 
                WHEN a.client_id IN (SELECT id FROM clients WHERE plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')) 
                THEN a.client_id
                ELSE d.titular_id
            END as titular_id
        FROM appointments a
        LEFT JOIN dependents d ON d.id = a.client_id
        WHERE a.appointment_date >= v_mes_inicio
          AND a.appointment_date <= v_mes_fim
          AND a.status != 'cancelado'
    ),
    clinica_uso AS (
        SELECT
            c.plano,
            COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS titulares_com_uso
        FROM clients c
        WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND c.id IN (SELECT titular_id FROM clientes_com_uso)
        GROUP BY c.plano
    )
    SELECT
        pb.plano::text,
        COALESCE(pb.totais, 0)::bigint,
        COALESCE(pb.n_sem, 0)::bigint,
        COALESCE(pb.n_sem_ant, 0)::bigint,
        COALESCE(pb.n_mes, 0)::bigint,
        COALESCE(pb.n_mes_ant, 0)::bigint,
        -- OTIMIZAÇÃO 3: Usar NULLIF para evitar divisão por zero e prevenir overflow
        CASE 
            WHEN pb.totais > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(os.qtd_em_divida, 0)::numeric / pb.totais * 100, 2)
            ELSE 0
        END,
        COALESCE(ROUND(os.avg_delay::numeric, 0), 0),
        CASE 
            WHEN pb.totais > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(cu.titulares_com_uso, 0)::numeric / pb.totais * 100, 1)
            ELSE 0
        END
    FROM plan_base pb
    LEFT JOIN overdue_stats os ON os.plano = pb.plano
    LEFT JOIN clinica_uso cu ON cu.plano = pb.plano
    ORDER BY pb.totais DESC NULLS LAST;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_sales_by_seller()
 RETURNS TABLE(vendedor text, vendas_mes bigint, vendas_mes_anterior bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
    WITH 
    target_plans AS (SELECT unnest(ARRAY['Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual']) AS plano),
    vendas AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(NULLIF(vendedor, ''), 'Não Identificado') AS vendedor_nome,
            created_at
        FROM clients
        WHERE plano IN (SELECT plano FROM target_plans)
          AND created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 month')
    )
    SELECT
        vendedor_nome,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS vendas_mes,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - interval '1 month')
                         AND created_at < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS vendas_mes_anterior
    FROM vendas
    GROUP BY vendedor_nome
    ORDER BY vendas_mes DESC;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_sales_by_seller(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(vendedor text, vendas_mes bigint, vendas_mes_anterior bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
    current_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE);
    last_month_start date := date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month');
    last_month_end date := current_month_start - INTERVAL '1 day';
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH current_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(vendedor, 'Não informado') AS vendedor,
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS vendas
        FROM clients
        WHERE created_at >= current_month_start
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY vendedor
    ),
    previous_month AS (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(vendedor, 'Não informado') AS vendedor,
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS vendas
        FROM clients
        WHERE created_at >= last_month_start AND created_at <= last_month_end
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY vendedor
    )
    SELECT
        COALESCE(cm.vendedor, pm.vendedor) AS vendedor,
        COALESCE(cm.vendas, 0)::bigint AS vendas_mes,
        COALESCE(pm.vendas, 0)::bigint AS vendas_mes_anterior
    FROM current_month cm
    FULL OUTER JOIN previous_month pm ON cm.vendedor = pm.vendedor
    ORDER BY vendas_mes DESC;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_sales_dashboard()
 RETURNS TABLE(vendedor text, vendas_mes bigint, vendas_mes_anterior bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_mes_inicio     date := date_trunc('month', current_date)::date;
    v_mes_ant_inicio date := date_trunc('month', current_date - interval '1 month')::date;
    v_mes_ant_fim    date := (date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 day')::date;
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
        COALESCE(c.vendedor, 'Sem Vendedor')::text,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.created_at::date >= v_mes_inicio)::bigint,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.created_at::date >= v_mes_ant_inicio AND c.created_at::date <= v_mes_ant_fim)::bigint
    FROM clients c
    WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
    GROUP BY c.vendedor
    ORDER BY vendas_mes DESC;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_taxa_ocupacao(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(mes text, sala text, taxa_ocupacao numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    -- Capacidade INDIVIDUAL de uma sala
    -- Cálculo: 22 dias úteis * 16 slots (8h * 2/h) = 352 atendimentos/mês por sala
    single_room_capacity int := 352; 
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
        to_char(date_trunc('month', appointment_date), 'YYYY-MM') as mes,
        -- Trata salas vazias ou nulas
        COALESCE(NULLIF(a.room, ''), 'Sem Sala Definida') as sala,
        -- Cálculo: (Total na sala / 352) * 100
        ROUND((COUNT(*) * 100.0 / single_room_capacity), 2) as taxa_ocupacao
    FROM appointments a
    JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
    WHERE appointment_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - interval '5 months') -- Últimos 6 meses
    AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    AND a.status != 'cancelado' -- Considera tudo que ocupa agenda (Agendado, Confirmado, Finalizado...)
    GROUP BY date_trunc('month', appointment_date), a.room
    ORDER BY mes, sala;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_tempo_medio_consultas(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(mes text, tempo_medio numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    SELECT 
        to_char(date_trunc('month', appointment_date), 'YYYY-MM') as mes,
        -- Calcula diferença entre hora real de fim e início em minutos
        ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (consultation_end_time - consultation_start_time)) / 60), 1) as tempo_medio
    FROM appointments a
    JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
    WHERE appointment_date >= CURRENT_DATE - interval '6 months'
    AND consultation_end_time IS NOT NULL 
    AND consultation_start_time IS NOT NULL
    AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    GROUP BY date_trunc('month', appointment_date)
    ORDER BY mes;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_today_funnel_status()
 RETURNS TABLE(status_label text, count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  WITH today_appointments AS (
    SELECT
      id,
      status, -- ex: 'agendado', 'confirmado', 'finalizado'
      checkin_time,
      payment_status -- ex: 'pendente', 'pago'
    FROM
      public.appointments
    WHERE
      appointment_date = CURRENT_DATE
  )
  SELECT
    'Agendados' AS status_label,
    count(*) AS count
  FROM
    today_appointments
  WHERE
    status = 'agendado' AND checkin_time IS NULL
  
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT
    'Aguardando Atendimento' AS status_label,
    count(*) AS count
  FROM
    today_appointments
  WHERE
    checkin_time IS NOT NULL AND status IN ('agendado', 'confirmado') -- Considera que fez check-in mas ainda não foi finalizado
    
  UNION ALL
  
  SELECT
    'Atendimentos Finalizados' AS status_label,
    count(*) AS count
  FROM
    today_appointments
  WHERE
    status = 'finalizado' -- Supondo que você tenha um status 'finalizado'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'Pagamentos Pendentes' AS status_label,
    count(*) AS count
  FROM
    today_appointments
  WHERE
    status = 'finalizado' AND payment_status = 'pendente';
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_today_funnel_status(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(status_label text, count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
RETURN QUERY
    WITH today_appointments AS (
        SELECT
            a.id, a.status, a.checkin_time, a.payment_status
        FROM public.appointments a
        JOIN public.clients c ON a.client_id = c.id
        WHERE a.appointment_date = CURRENT_DATE
        AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    )
    SELECT 'Agendados' AS status_label, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM today_appointments
    WHERE status = 'agendado' AND checkin_time IS NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Aguardando' AS status_label, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM today_appointments
    WHERE checkin_time IS NOT NULL AND status IN ('agendado', 'confirmado', 'chegou')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'Finalizados' AS status_label, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM today_appointments
    WHERE status = 'finalizado'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'A Pagar' AS status_label, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM today_appointments
    WHERE payment_status = 'pendente' AND status != 'cancelado';
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_weekly_active_titulares()
 RETURNS TABLE(week_label text, cumulative_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 STABLE
AS $function$
DECLARE
    total_anterior bigint;
BEGIN
    -- Total de titulares ativos cadastrados antes das últimas 12 semanas
    SELECT COUNT(*) INTO total_anterior
    FROM clients
    WHERE plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
      AND status = 'ATIVO'
      AND created_at < date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - interval '12 weeks');

    RETURN QUERY
    WITH weeks AS (
        SELECT generate_series(0, 11) AS week_offset
    ),
    week_starts AS (
        SELECT
            (date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - interval '12 weeks') + (week_offset || ' weeks')::interval)::date AS week_start
        FROM weeks
    ),
    weekly_new AS (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('week', created_at)::date AS week_start,
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS new_count
        FROM clients
        WHERE plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
          AND status = 'ATIVO'
          AND created_at >= date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - interval '12 weeks')
        GROUP BY week_start
    ),
    cumulative AS (
        SELECT
            ws.week_start,
            (COALESCE(SUM(wn.new_count) OVER (ORDER BY ws.week_start ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0) + total_anterior)::bigint AS cum
        FROM week_starts ws
        LEFT JOIN weekly_new wn ON ws.week_start = wn.week_start
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(week_start, 'DD/MM') AS week_label,
        cum AS cumulative_count
    FROM cumulative
    ORDER BY week_start;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_weekly_active_titulares(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(week_label text, cumulative_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE sql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
    WITH weekly_new AS (
        SELECT
            date_trunc('week', created_at)::date AS week_start,
            COUNT(*) AS new_in_week
        FROM clients
        WHERE status = 'ATIVO'
          AND created_at IS NOT NULL
          AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
        GROUP BY week_start
    )
    SELECT
        to_char(week_start, 'DD/MM') AS week_label,
        SUM(new_in_week) OVER (ORDER BY week_start)::bigint AS cumulative_count
    FROM weekly_new
    ORDER BY week_start DESC
    LIMIT 12;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_weekly_consultations()
 RETURNS TABLE(week_start date, count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
    SELECT
      date_trunc('week', a.appointment_date)::date AS week_start,
      COUNT(c.id) AS count
    FROM
      public.consultations AS c
    JOIN
      public.appointments AS a ON c.appointment_id = a.id
    GROUP BY
      week_start
    ORDER BY
      week_start;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_weekly_overdue_stats(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'Bim Familiar,Bim Individual'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(week_start date, total_receivable numeric, overdue_10_29 numeric, overdue_30_59 numeric, overdue_60_89 numeric, overdue_90_plus numeric, overdue_percentage numeric)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    RETURN QUERY
    WITH weeks AS (
        SELECT generate_series(
            date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 weeks')::date,
            date_trunc('week', CURRENT_DATE)::date,
            '1 week'::interval
        ) AS week_start
    ),
    payments AS (
        SELECT
            p.client_id,
            p.amount,
            p.due_date,
            p.status,
            c.plano
        FROM asaas_payments p
        JOIN clients c ON p.client_id = c.id
        WHERE (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    ),
    weekly AS (
        SELECT
            w.week_start,
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount) FILTER (WHERE p.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')), 0) AS total_receivable,
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount) FILTER (
                WHERE p.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')
                  AND p.due_date >= w.week_start
                  AND p.due_date < w.week_start + INTERVAL '10 days'
            ), 0) AS over_10,
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount) FILTER (
                WHERE p.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')
                  AND p.due_date >= w.week_start + INTERVAL '10 days'
                  AND p.due_date < w.week_start + INTERVAL '30 days'
            ), 0) AS over_30,
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount) FILTER (
                WHERE p.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')
                  AND p.due_date >= w.week_start + INTERVAL '30 days'
                  AND p.due_date < w.week_start + INTERVAL '60 days'
            ), 0) AS over_60,
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount) FILTER (
                WHERE p.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')
                  AND p.due_date >= w.week_start + INTERVAL '60 days'
                  AND p.due_date < w.week_start + INTERVAL '90 days'
            ), 0) AS over_90,
            COALESCE(SUM(p.amount) FILTER (
                WHERE p.status IN ('PENDING', 'OVERDUE')
                  AND p.due_date >= w.week_start + INTERVAL '90 days'
            ), 0) AS over_90plus
        FROM weeks w
        CROSS JOIN payments p  -- cuidado: pode ser pesado, mas com filtro de plano reduzimos
        GROUP BY w.week_start
    )
    SELECT
        w.week_start,
        w.total_receivable,
        w.over_10,
        w.over_30 - w.over_10 AS overdue_30_59,  -- ajuste fino
        w.over_60 - w.over_30 AS overdue_60_89,
        w.over_90plus + (w.over_90 - w.over_60) AS overdue_90_plus,
        CASE
            WHEN w.total_receivable > 0
            THEN ROUND(((w.over_10 + w.over_30 + w.over_60 + w.over_90 + w.over_90plus) / w.total_receivable * 100)::numeric, 2)
            ELSE 0
        END AS overdue_percentage
    FROM weekly w
    ORDER BY w.week_start;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_weekly_titulares(plan_filter text DEFAULT 'all'::text)
 RETURNS TABLE(week_label text, cumulative_count bigint)
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  WITH weekly_new_clients AS (
    SELECT
      date_trunc('week', c.created_at)::date AS week_start,
      COUNT(c.id) AS new_clients_in_week
    FROM
      public.clients c
    WHERE
      c.status = 'ATIVO' AND c.created_at IS NOT NULL
      AND (plan_filter = 'all' OR c.plano = ANY(string_to_array(plan_filter, ',')))
    GROUP BY week_start
  )
  SELECT
    to_char(wnc.week_start, 'DD/MM') AS week_label,
    SUM(wnc.new_clients_in_week) OVER (ORDER BY wnc.week_start)::bigint AS cumulative_count
  FROM
    weekly_new_clients wnc
  ORDER BY wnc.week_start
  LIMIT 12; -- Limita às ultimas 12 semanas
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.normalize_name(text)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 IMMUTABLE
AS $function$
SELECT lower(trim(regexp_replace(unaccent($1), '\s+', ' ', 'g')));
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.normalize_name_text(input_text text)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Converte para minúsculo, depois capitaliza a primeira letra de cada palavra
    -- O TRIM remove espaços extras no início/fim
    RETURN INITCAP(LOWER(TRIM(input_text)));
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.only_numbers(input_text text)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Remove tudo que NÃO for dígito (0-9)
    RETURN REGEXP_REPLACE(input_text, '[^0-9]', '', 'g');
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.schedule_cancel_overdue_clients()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_result RECORD;
    v_canceled_count INTEGER := 0;
BEGIN
    -- Executa o cancelamento e registra no log
    FOR v_result IN 
        SELECT * FROM public.cancel_clients_overdue_60_days()
    LOOP
        v_canceled_count := v_canceled_count + 1;
        
        -- Registra no log de ações
        INSERT INTO action_logs (
            action, 
            details, 
            user_email, 
            created_at
        ) VALUES (
            'AUTO_CANCEL_OVERDUE',
            jsonb_build_object(
                'client_id', v_result.client_id,
                'client_name', v_result.client_name,
                'asaas_subscription_id', v_result.asaas_subscription_id,
                'days_overdue', v_result.days_overdue,
                'cancel_date', CURRENT_DATE
            ),
            'system',
            NOW()
        );
    END LOOP;
    
    -- Registra resumo da execução
    INSERT INTO action_logs (
        action, 
        details, 
        user_email, 
        created_at
    ) VALUES (
        'AUTO_CANCEL_BATCH',
        jsonb_build_object(
            'canceled_count', v_canceled_count,
            'execution_date', CURRENT_DATE
        ),
        'system',
        NOW()
    );
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_client_financial_status()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$BEGIN
    -- 1. Define como ATRASO quem tem pagamentos vencidos
    UPDATE clients c
    SET status = 'ATRASO'
    WHERE c.asaas_customer_id IN (
        SELECT asaas_customer_id FROM asaas_payments WHERE status = 'OVERDUE'
    )
    AND c.status = 'ATIVO';

    -- 2. Define como ATIVO quem estava em ATRASO mas não tem mais pagamentos vencidos
    UPDATE clients c
    SET status = 'ATIVO'
    WHERE c.status = 'ATRASO'
    AND c.asaas_customer_id NOT IN (
        SELECT asaas_customer_id FROM asaas_payments WHERE status = 'OVERDUE'
    );
END;$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.sync_client_statuses()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public', 'extensions'
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- 1. CANCELADO: mais de 60 dias em atraso (OVERDUE ou PENDING vencido)
    UPDATE clients c
    SET status = 'CANCELADO',
        observacao = COALESCE(observacao || '; ', '') || 'cancelado por atraso (' || CURRENT_DATE || ')'
    WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
      AND c.status != 'CANCELADO'
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM asaas_payments p
        WHERE p.client_id = c.id
          AND (p.status = 'OVERDUE' OR (p.status = 'PENDING' AND p.due_date < CURRENT_DATE))
          AND p.due_date < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days')
      );

    -- 2. INATIVO: entre 30 e 60 dias em atraso
    UPDATE clients c
    SET status = 'INATIVO'
    WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
      AND c.status NOT IN ('CANCELADO', 'INATIVO')
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM asaas_payments p
        WHERE p.client_id = c.id
          AND (p.status = 'OVERDUE' OR (p.status = 'PENDING' AND p.due_date < CURRENT_DATE))
          AND p.due_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days')
          AND p.due_date < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days')
      );

    -- 3. ATRASO: até 30 dias em atraso
    UPDATE clients c
    SET status = 'ATRASO'
    WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
      AND c.status NOT IN ('CANCELADO', 'INATIVO', 'ATRASO')
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM asaas_payments p
        WHERE p.client_id = c.id
          AND (p.status = 'OVERDUE' OR (p.status = 'PENDING' AND p.due_date < CURRENT_DATE))
          AND p.due_date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days')
      );

    -- 4. ATIVO: nenhum pagamento em atraso
    UPDATE clients c
    SET status = 'ATIVO'
    WHERE c.plano IN ('Bim Familiar', 'Bim Individual')
      AND c.status NOT IN ('CANCELADO')
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM asaas_payments p
        WHERE p.client_id = c.id
          AND (p.status = 'OVERDUE' OR (p.status = 'PENDING' AND p.due_date < CURRENT_DATE))
      );
END;
$function$
